who: procurement managers in mid-sized companies processing 10-20 vendor contracts/month
offer: For procurement managers in mid-sized companies processing 10-20 vendor contracts/month, inconsistent vendor performance tracking causes missed opportunities for cost savings. We provide performance reports instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem: Inconsistent vendor performance tracking leads to missed opportunities for cost savings and compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement managers
Indie Hackers posts and comments on workflows
DM outreach to procurement managers with demo video
Community forums where procurement managers share tools
try_it: Let users try monthly performance report generation and vendor scorecard on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
